summary: Mission Control UI Testing Complete - All features working. Tony Stark-style Mission Control page with 5 panels (Agent War Room, Project Brain, God Mode, Build Timeline, Knowledge Graph) fully functional. 3D visualization with pure Three.js working correctly.

minor.issue: 4 console 404 errors detected (likely favicon or static assets)

passed_tests: ✅ Mission Control page loads at /mission-control/:projectId
✅ AGENTFORGE OS branding and Mission Control subtitle displayed
✅ Back button navigates to /studio
✅ Command bar input accepts and executes commands (e.g., 'god mode')
✅ System status indicator shows 'Systems Online' (green indicator)
✅ Side navigation shows all 5 panels: Agent War Room, Project Brain, God Mode, Build Timeline, Knowledge Graph
✅ Agent War Room (default panel) - Shows 6 agents: COMMANDER, ATLAS, FORGE, SENTINEL, PROBE, PRISM
✅ Agent War Room - Simulated agent activity feed updates every 3 seconds
✅ Agent War Room - 'SYSTEMS NOMINAL' status displayed
✅ Project Brain panel - 3D canvas (Three.js) renders correctly
✅ Project Brain - 8 NODES and 9 CONNECTIONS badges displayed
✅ Project Brain - Architecture Layers legend (Presentation, Gateway, Services, Data)
✅ Project Brain - Holographic ring with particle system visible
✅ Project Brain - Drag to rotate works
✅ Project Brain - Scroll to zoom works
✅ Project Brain - Stats and Reset buttons functional
✅ God Mode panel - 'What will you build?' header displayed
✅ God Mode panel - Input field with placeholder 'Build an AI fishing analytics SaaS...'
✅ God Mode panel - Create Company button displayed
✅ God Mode panel - 8 phase cards: Planning, Backend, Database, Auth, Payments, Frontend, Landing, Deploy
✅ Build Timeline panel - List and Timeline view toggle buttons work
✅ Build Timeline panel - 'No builds yet' message displayed for new project
✅ Knowledge Graph panel - Placeholder with Database icon displayed
✅ Quick Actions - God Mode gradient button navigates to God Mode panel
✅ Quick Actions - Run Build button present
critical_code_review_comments: VisualProjectBrain.jsx successfully rewritten to use pure Three.js instead of @react-three/drei
Double canvas rendering issue fixed with initialization guards (rendererRef.current check)
3D visualization shows architecture nodes in circular layout with holographic ring and particles
Agent activity simulation working with 3-second interval
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mission Control UI fully tested. All 5 panels working: 1) Agent War Room shows 6 agents with simulated activity feed, 2) Project Brain has working 3D Three.js visualization with drag/zoom, 3) God Mode shows company creation form with 8 phases, 4) Build Timeline has List/Timeline view toggle, 5) Knowledge Graph shows placeholder. Command bar executes commands. Back button navigates to /studio. System status indicator shows online/offline state.
